name: Thai Yam Yai Siamese Princess Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Shrimp, small (peeled, deveined, rinsed in cold water)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, add all of the meat ingredients and bring to a boil.
Bring it to a boil for about 20 minutes or until the pork is thoroughly cooked.
2. Drain the water and set the meats aside.
3. Place all of the salad dressing ingredients into a food processor or blender.
Blend until the ingredients become liquid.
4. Using your choice of salad greens, place the cooked meats on top of the greens.
5. Top with the salad dressing.
